title: Batch correction + batch-vs-biology confound report
context: Honest cross-dataset work demands quantifying batch vs biology before and after correction and discussing over-correction risk (PLAN §8 M2). Confounding must be reported, not hidden. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Add batch correction with a confound report that quantifies batch vs biology before/after correction and discusses over-correction risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Confound report quantifies batch vs biology before and after correction.
Over-correction risk is explicitly discussed with diagnostics.
Correction is reproducible with a provenance manifest; method and parameters recorded.
output: A pull request adding batch correction plus a batch-vs-biology confound report.
